variables.staywellDbConnectionString: [format('Server={0}.postgres.database.azure.com;Database={1};Port=5432;User Id={2};Password={3};Ssl Mode=VerifyFull;Include Error Detail=True', parameters('postgresServerName'), parameters('staywellDbName'), parameters('staywellDbAppUser'), parameters('staywellDbAppPassword'))]
